mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.inbound_id, i.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, i.material_id, i.material_name, i.spec, i.unit, i.location_id, l.location_name, i.quantity, i.unit_cost, i.total_cost, i.batch_no, i.production_date, i.expiry_date FROM wms_inbound_order_item i LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse w ON w.id = i.warehouse_id AND w.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN wms_location l ON l.id = i.location_id AND l.deleted = 0 WHERE i.inbound_id = #{inboundId} ORDER BY i.id ASC

SELECT id, inbound_id, warehouse_id, material_id, material_name, spec, unit, location_id, quantity, unit_cost, total_cost, batch_no, production_date, expiry_date, trace_batch_id, created_at, updated_at FROM wms_inbound_order_item WHERE inbound_id = #{inboundId} ORDER BY id ASC
